title: Monday Vibe Query

posts.author: brian.maina (Brian Maina | Creative Bits LLC)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Monday Community,

I have been exploring Monday Vibe and wanted to know its full capabilities within the Monday space before acquiring a subscription.

I have been testing on trial mode and I’m unable to have multiple draft applications - do I need to purchase a package to explore on this: on the same note, are there other limitations which are restricted to an active subscription?

posts.author: amichay (Amichay Even Chen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @brian.maina!
I’m Amichay from the vibe team
monday vibe lets you create unlimited apps in draft mode. The trial allows you to publish them, making them visible to your team.

You can see more about prompting techniques and vibe abilities here:
https://youtu.be/x3O1hK-Eblc?si=p6ZebEFXUoAUKB16

posts.author: drtanvisachar (Dr. Tanvi Sachar- Certified Monday.com Partner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @brian.maina
Hi there, welcome to the community.

Yes, this is expected in trial mode. During a monday.com trial, Monday Vibe has limited functionality, including only allowing a single draft app. Creating and managing multiple drafts requires an active subscription.

Trials also have other restrictions, such as lower limits on automations, integrations, and access to some advanced features, depending on the plan.

Dr. Tanvi Sachar
Monday Certified Partner, Tuesday Wizard

posts.author: brian.maina (Brian Maina | Creative Bits LLC)
posts.cookedHtml:
amichay:

I’m Amichay from the vibe team

Hello Amichay,

thanks for your response.
THe video was really helpful

One last thing - is there support for multiple boards and sub-items in boards?

posts.author: amichay (Amichay Even Chen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @brian.maina
Yes, open vibe from the topbar heart icon and select up to 5 boards before creating the app.
It can also read/write subitems
Try it out monday vibe
